query:
SELECT id, title, versionLabel, category, active, summary, LEFT(body, 160) AS bodyPreview, createdAt
FROM release_notes
WHERE active = 1
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2P9ir9M7b3E7Qkh.8b2c854ea8b3 --database HPubf4auNvt8KXvgrLad5c --execute SELECT id, title, versionLabel, category, active, summary, LEFT(body, 160) AS bodyPreview, createdAt
FROM release_notes
WHERE active = 1
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;

rows.title: Points in Play Now Includes All Bonuses
rows.summary: Points in Play now shows your full leaderboard total, including boost bonuses.
rows.bodyPreview: We corrected the My Day points display so it lines up with the leaderboard. No action is needed — your submitted results and bonuses are still counted.

rows.title: Proof update
rows.summary: Proof is easier to browse and respond to.
rows.bodyPreview: Proof posts are easier to browse, reactions and comments are live, and Deep Thought now shows the right interpretation. Please tap to acknowledge.

rows.title: App polish
rows.summary: Swipe navigation and a cleaner Board are live.
rows.bodyPreview: Swipe between sections, open boost tokens only when needed, and read the mobile top three more easily. Please tap to acknowledge.

rows.title: Edit update
rows.summary: Boost scoring, participant history, refresh behaviour, and update notes are now easier to understand.
rows.bodyPreview: We have separated base daily points from named boosts, added a safer path for viewing participant history, prepared pull-to-refresh for the PWA, and introduced
